text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after the Unity Cup and the Twinkle
Series have both wrapped up, Director Akikawa
summons our team.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well done on getting through all the ups and
downs life has thrown at you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And more importantly, congratulations on
winning the Unity Cup! Those were some truly
moving, riveting, and most wonderful races!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
It was quite the treat watching you sprint toward
victory, fueled by all the teamwork you've
cultivated!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was holding their breaths as they
watched your bout against Team Zenith. Surely it
is safe to say that everyone was blown away!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The strength of your team is truly commendable.
Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As a special reward, allow me to present to you a
voucher for a free carrot BBQ to use now that
things have settled down!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to seeing your future growth and
performance!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
To you illustrious Umamusume, I present this
bonus reward!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As your team name is Carrot Pudding, I thought it
only appropriate to reward you with a gift that's
just as whimsical and playful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! This is so awesome! It's a ninja scroll!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
So it is! I bought it in Hollywood. It's called the
Scroll of Winners, and it's said to contain the
wisdom needed to triumph in one's battles!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! Hey, guys, let's all play ninjas!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Receiving such a wonderful reward raises our
team's spirit higher than ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Everyone got your glass ready?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Cheeers!

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Cheeers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: This is so good!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It really is! Oh, we've still got a ton of carrots to
go around!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Three cheers for Director Akikawa! How blessed
we are.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yahoo! I can't believe we get to have a BBQ on
the beach—talk about paradise!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And it's even better 'cause I'm surrounded by all
of y'all!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Gettin' to celebrate the three years we've worked
together sure is somethin' else! All these
memories're rushin' back to me as we speak!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes. It's making me feel so warm and fluffy...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What's warm and fluffy now? Are you talking
about dessert? If so, I want some!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I think she's being metaphorical, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing my team enjoying themselves so
thoroughly, I can't help but smile.
choice_data_list:
(Things sure were rough in the beginning,
though...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still remember how Rice Shower stopped coming
to practice, and how they got challenged by
Team Zenith to an unofficial race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've overcome a lot together in these three
years while confronting the challenges presented
by the team competition.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer? What's got you so deep in thought?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You'd better snap out of it before there's nothin'
left to eat!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The party's just beginnin', so I hope you're
hungry!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Here, Trainer! I got some carrot juice for you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-oh dear, but I brought some too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You did?! Haha! I guess it's double servings of
carrot juice for Trainer, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then, a familiar group shows up.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Fancy meeting you here! Did you guys get a
voucher for this carrot BBQ as well?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm guessin' y'all got one too, then?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Yup. The director said it was a reward for all our
hard work!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I doubt that's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Hello. It's been a while, hasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa was singing your praises when
she handed us our voucher. She has high
expectations for you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I must admit I was a mite jealous, but that's fine.
I'm the type who enjoys a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm a trainer, we've become proper
rivals. I look forward to facing you in the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The road stretches ever onward before us.
<chrname> and I promise to keep
putting our best foot forward!
